subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet which We have adorned with the ornament of the Pen moved by the fingers of the Ancient King, and sent unto him who hath turned towards Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح زیناه بطراز القلم الذی حرکه اصابع مالک القدم و ارسلناه الی الذی اقبل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
